member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemDataObject
member.summary: Current way to fetch recommendation data from disk. Will probably change to fetching something from a server.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.GetSelectedSolution(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData[])
member.summary: Finds the first selected solution in the input array.
member.returns: Returns the first selected solution. If no solution is selected, it returns null.

member.summary: Returns all the packages passed via packageIds and their informal dependencies (stored in AdditionalPackages)
member.returns: List of PackageDetails

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.ApplyPreviousSelection(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData)
member.summary: Reapplies the previous selection on the view data
member.param: The recommendation view data to update

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.FilterByType(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackageViewData},Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType)
member.summary: Returns the packages that are of the given recommendation type
member.param: All the package view data as returned by the recommender system
member.returns: The filtered list

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.FindRecommendedSolution(System.ValueTuple{Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.Scoring}[])
member.summary: Finds the recommended solution among the scored solutions.
member.param: An array of tuples, where each tuple contains a PossibleSolution and its corresponding Scoring.
member.returns: Returns the recommended solution with the maximum total score.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.MarkIncompatibleHostingModels(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData)
member.summary: Looks through the hosting models and marks them incompatible if necessary (deselected and recommendation type incompatible). Note that this might leave the recommendation in an invalid state (no hosting model selected)

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.FindRecommendedPackageViewById(System.Collections.Generic.List{Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackageViewData},System.String)
member.summary: Finds a recommended package view by its ID from a list.
member.param: A list of Recommended Package ViewData representing the packages.
The ID of the package to find.
member.returns: Returns the RecommendedPackageViewData object with the matching ID. If none is found, it returns null.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.IsQuestionAnswered(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question)
member.summary: Checks if the specific question has been answered.
member.returns: Returns true if the question has been answered by the user, otherwise returns false.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.AreArraysEqual``1(``0[],``0[])
member.summary: Compares two arrays of type for equality.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the arrays.
member.returns: true if all elements are equal and they are in the same order, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationUtils.GetSectionTypeNamesInOrder(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory,System.Type[]})
member.summary: Gets the section type names in order from the provided section mapping.
member.param: A dictionary mapping OnboardingSectionCategory to SectionList types.
member.returns: A list of section type names sorted in ascending order.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType
member.summary: Types of recommendation that are both used in ViewData and in the ground truth data for the recommendation. Architecture choices must be made. Packages are typically optional.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.None
member.summary: Invalid value, indicates error.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.MainArchitectureChoice
member.summary: Featured option (e.g. NGO if NGO is the recommended architecture) Note that in the case of architecture choice, the user should select something.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.SecondArchitectureChoice
member.summary: Non-featured option (e.g. N4E if NGO is the recommended architecture)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.NetcodeFeatured
member.summary: Associated feature in the Netcode section

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.HostingFeatured
member.summary: Associated feature in the Hosting Model section

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.OptionalStandard
member.summary: Optional but not highlighted

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.NotRecommended
member.summary: Not recommended, but not incompatible with the user intent.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.Incompatible
member.summary: Incompatible with the user intent. Might even break something, we need to warn the user

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationType.Hidden
member.summary: Packages that are not visible for the User but useful for the analytics

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.Scoring
member.summary: Aggregates scores for a given solution and fetches the reasons for the highest score

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.Scoring.GetReasonString
member.summary: Gets the reason for increased scores
member.returns: The explanatory string

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystem
member.summary: Builds recommendation views based on Questionnaire data and Answer data. The recommendation is based on the scoring of the answers, which is controlled by the RecommenderSystemData.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystem.GetRecommendation(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData)
member.summary: Main entry point for the recommender system: computes the recommendation based on the questionnaire data and the answers. If no answer has been given or the questionnaire does not match the answers, this returns null.
member.param: The questionnaire that the user filled.
member.returns: The recommendation view data.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystem.GetSolutionsToRecommendedPackageViewData
member.summary: Get the view data for all possible solution selections.
member.returns: The constructed set of views

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData
member.summary: Contains all the architectural options that we offer to users, with a score specific to their answers. This is the data that we show in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData.NetcodeOptions
member.summary: NGO or N4E or Other

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData.ServerArchitectureOptions
member.summary: Client hosted / dedicated server. It comes with UGS services that we might or might not recommend

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.SolutionsToRecommendedPackageViewData
member.summary: For each selection (netcode, hosting) model, there is a specific set of recommended packages This class stores this information and provides access to it.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData
member.summary: Base fields for things that we can recommend (typically a package or a solution).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.RecommendationType
member.summary: How much we want to recommend this item. With the score, this is what is modified by the recommender system. The architecture option with the best score will be marked as MainArchitectureChoice, the other as SecondArchitectureChoice, which enables us to highlight the recommended option.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.Selected
member.summary: Item is part of the selection, because it was preselected or user selected it.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.Reason
member.summary: Optional: reason why this recommendation was made

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.DocsUrl
member.summary: Url to feature documentation

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.IsInstalledAsProjectDependency
member.summary: Recommendation is installed and direct dependency

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedItemViewData.InstalledVersion
member.summary: Installed version number of a package

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData
member.summary: Architectural solution (netcode or server architecture) that we offer. It comes with an optional main package and associated recommended packages.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData.Score
member.summary: How much of a match is this item. Computed by recommender system based on answers.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData.MainPackage
member.summary: The main package to install for this solution (note that this might be null, e.g. for client hosted game)

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackageViewData
member.summary: Single package that is part of a recommendation.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackageViewData.ShortDescription
member.summary: A short description of the feature.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData
member.summary: The source of data for the recommender system. Based on scoring and this data, the recommender system will populate the recommendation view data.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.TargetUnityVersion
member.summary: The Unity version for which this recommendation data is valid.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.RecommendedSolutions
member.summary: Stores all the recommended solutions. This is serialized.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.Packages
member.summary: Stores all the package details. This is serialized.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.PackageDetailsById
member.summary: Provides convenient access to the package details by package id.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.IsHostingModelCompatibleWithNetcode(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution,System.String@)
member.summary: Checks for incompatibility between the netcode and hosting model.
member.param: The reason for the incompatibility, filled when this function returns false.
member.returns: True if compatible (default), False otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommenderSystemData.UpdateIncompatibility(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Patch incompatibility values.
member.param: Whether we should now consider the two solutions compatible
If incompatible, why it is incompatible.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution
member.summary: A possible solution and whether packages are recommended or not

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.Type
member.summary: The type of solution

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.Title
member.summary: The name of the solution as shown in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.MainPackageId
member.summary: Optional package ID associated with that solution (e.g. a netcode package or the cloud code package). Use this field if the package has to mandatorily be installed when the solution is selected.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.DocUrl
member.summary: Url to documentation describing the solution.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.ShortDescription
member.summary: Short description of the solution.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.RecommendedPackages
member.summary: The packages and the associated recommendation type. If the Type is a netcode Type, all the possible packages should be in this array. If the Type is a hosting model, this will contain only overrides in case a package is incompatible or featured for the hosting model.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolution.IncompatibleSolutions
member.summary: Solutions that are incompatible with this solution. Typically used for netcode solutions.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.IncompatibleSolution
member.summary: Stores why a solution is incompatible with something and why.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.IncompatibleSolution.Solution
member.summary: What is incompatible.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.IncompatibleSolution.Reason
member.summary: Why it is incompatible.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackage
member.summary: A package, whether it is recommended or not (context dependent), and why.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackage.PackageId
member.summary: The package id (e.g. com.unity.netcode)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackage.Type
member.summary: Whether it is recommended or not.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedPackage.Reason
member.summary: Why it is recommended or not.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PackageDetails.PreReleaseVersion
member.summary: In case we want to promote a specific pre-release version, this is set (by default, this is null and the default package manager version is used).

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PackageDetails.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Details about the package.
member.param: Ids of packages that should be installed along this one, but are not formal dependencies.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.IsReady
member.summary: Whether the versions data is ready to be used.

member.name: E:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.OnCheckFinished
member.summary: Triggered when this instance is ready

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.PackageId
member.summary: The package id e.g. com.unity.netcode

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.MinVersion
member.summary: The minimum version that we target.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.m_VersionsInfo
member.summary: The cached versions of the package.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.m_DefaultVersion
member.summary: version which would be installed by package manager

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.CheckForUpdates
member.summary: Start (online) request to check for available versions.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.PatchPackages(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData)
member.summary: Patch the recommendation view data directly.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.PreReleaseHandlingBase.PatchRecommenderSystemData
member.summary: Patch the recommender system data, which will be used for every use of the recommendation.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.SimplePreReleaseHandling
member.summary: Implementation that fetches unconditionally the version starting with a prefix for a given package, even if it is an experimental package

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.RecommendationView.SectionHeader.GenerateChoices(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData[],Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendedSolutionViewData@,System.String@)
member.summary: Returns a list of choices for the dropdown and appends k_ItemIsRecommendedAppend to the recommended choice.
member.param: The title of the selection solution with appended k_ItemIsRecommendedAppend
member.returns: List of Choices to be used with Dropdown

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.RecommendationView.RecommendationItemView
member.summary: View to show one option to the user Option can be shown as a radio button or as a checkbox.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.RecommendationView.RecommendationItemView.FeatureId
member.summary: Feature Id stores a unique identifier that identifies the feature. Usually this is the title of the solution or the package id.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.RecommendationView.RecommendationItemView.OnUserChangedSelection
member.summary: Triggered when the user changes the selection.

member.name: E:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.RecommendationView.SolutionSelectionView.OnUserChangedSolution
member.summary: Gets fired when the user changes the solution.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.QuestionSection
member.summary: Questions that go together in the Questionnaire view. Example: mandatory questions in "Game Specs" section, optional questions in "Advanced" section.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.QuestionViewFactory
member.summary: Creates visual elements that represent a question / the overview of the questionnaire

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses
member.summary: Style common to the multiplayer center, excepted for the getting started tab (which needs shared style)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.QuestionView
member.summary: Game spec standard question

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.MandatoryQuestion
member.summary: Game spec mandatory question, highlighted

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.QuestionText
member.summary: Description of game spec section

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.QuestionSection
member.summary: Part of game spec questionnaire that contains several questions

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.QuestionSectionNoScrollbar
member.summary: Part of game spec questionnaire that contains several questions

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.NextStepButton
member.summary: Thicker button to go to a next step; e.g. Install packages

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.MainSplitView
member.summary: The splitview that is used in Recommendation and Getting Started Tab

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.MainSplitViewRight
member.summary: The right container of the main split view

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.MainSplitViewLeft
member.summary: The left container of the main split view

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.UI.StyleClasses.ViewHeadline
member.summary: The style for the Headline that is used in the main views

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.MultiplayerCenterWindow.m_MainContainer
member.summary: Nest the main container in a VisualElement to allow for easy enabling/disabling of the entire window but without the spinning icon.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.MultiplayerCenterWindow.m_MultiplayerCenterAnalytics
member.summary: This is the reference Multiplayer Center analytics implementation. This class owns it.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.MultiplayerCenterWindow.RequestShowGettingStartedTabAfterDomainReload
member.summary: Changes Tab from Recommendation to the Quickstart tab.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.GettingStartedTabView
member.summary: This is the main view for the Quickstart tab. Note that in the code, the Quickstart tab is referred to as the Getting Started tab.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.GettingStartedTabView.m_LastFoundSectionTypes
member.summary: To find out if new section appeared, we need to keep track of the last section types we found.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.Name
member.summary: The name as displayed in the tab button Should be serialized.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.RootVisualElement
member.summary: The root visual element of the tab view. The setter will only be used if the root visual element is null when the tab is created.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.SetVisible(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the tab view visible or not.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.IsEnabled
member.summary: If true the Tab can be selected by the user.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.ToolTip
member.summary: Tooltip which will be shown on the Tab Button.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.Refresh
member.summary: Refreshes the UI Elements according to latest data. If the UI is not created yet, it does it.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.Clear
member.summary: Unregister all events and clear UI Elements

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.ITabView.MultiplayerCenterAnalytics
member.summary: The Multiplayer Center Analytics provider.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Window.TabGroup.CreateTabs
member.summary: Instantiates the visual elements for all the tabs. Use this to create the tabs for the first time the UI is shown or after a domain reload.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject
member.summary: The unity object that contains the current choices of the user.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.QuestionnaireVersion
member.summary: The version of the questionnaire the answers correspond to.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.UserAnswers
member.summary: The answers of the user in the Game specs questionnaire.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.Preset
member.summary: Current preset selected by the user.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.SelectedSolutions
member.summary: The main selections made by the user in the recommendation tab.

member.name: E:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.OnSolutionSelectionChanged
member.summary: Raised when the SelectedSolutions changes

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.SetUserSelection(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution)
member.summary: Set the user selection and calls OnSelectionChanged if needed

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.UserChoicesObject.Save
member.summary: Save to disk (see filepath)

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic
member.summary: Question and answer logic manipulations.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.ValidateAnswers(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData)
member.summary: Checks if the answers make sense and correspond to the questions.
member.returns: A list of problems or an empty list.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.FindFirstUnansweredQuestion(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData)
member.summary: Finds the first unanswered question index, aka the first question to display. If all questions have been answered, the index is the length of the questions array.
member.returns: The index in the questions array or the size of the questions array

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.AnswersToDictionary(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData)
member.summary: Conversion to a dictionary for easier manipulation.
member.returns: The dictionary containing (id, list of answer id)

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.TryGetQuestionByQuestionId(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData,System.String,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question@)
member.summary: Checks if the question id exists in the questionnaire and return it.
member.returns: True if found, else false

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.ApplyPresetToAnswerData(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData)
member.summary: Applies the preset to the current answers and returns the new answers and the recommendation. It skips all the mandatory questions, which have to be answered separately.
member.param: The answers the user selected so far
member.returns: The new answer data and the associated recommendation(might be null).

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Logic.IsVersionLower(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares two versions and returns true if the versionToTest is lower than the currentVersion.
member.param: The version number that gets tested
The version number to test against
member.returns: True if versionToTest is lower than currentVersion

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PresetData
member.summary: The predefined answers for presets. This is meant to be read only and saved with the questionnaire

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PresetData.Presets
member.summary: The list of presets for which we have predefined answers (hopefully all possible values except None) This should contain as many values as the array.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PresetData.Answers
member.summary: The predefined answers for each preset, in the same order as . This should contain as many values as the array.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireObject
member.summary: The questionnaire scriptable object, used to store and edit the data

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireEditor
member.summary: Because of the "questionnaire" extension, the default inspector is not shown. Double clicking on the asset will open this custom inspector (in debug mode), which has a way to force saving the asset.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData
member.summary: The serializable data of the questionnaire

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData.FormatVersion
member.summary: The version of the format to serialize/deserialize data

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData.Version
member.summary: The version of the questionnaire itself (different questions, answer choice)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData.Questions
member.summary: All the questions in the right order (some might be hidden though)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData.PresetData
member.summary: The predefined answers for presets. The content should match the questions.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution
member.summary: Possible multiplayer solution that needs to be scored in order to assess a match. Some are mutually exclusive, some are not.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.NGO
member.summary: Netcode for GameObject, incompatible with N4E

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.N4E
member.summary: Netcode for Entities, incompatible with NGO

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.LS
member.summary: Client Hosted Architecture (also called "Listen server"; using a host and not a dedicated server)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.DS
member.summary: Dedicated server architecture (using a dedicated server and not a host)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.DA
member.summary: Distributed authority (Authority will be distributed across different players)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.CustomNetcode
member.summary: Not using Netcode for GameObjects nor Netcode for Entities

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.NoNetcode
member.summary: Works asynchronously, with a database

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.PossibleSolution.CloudCode
member.summary: Recommended backend for async games, without a Netcode (goes with )

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ViewType.Toggle
member.summary: Yes or No type of question best represented by a toggle

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ViewType.Radio
member.summary: A question with multiple choices and where you can select only one answer

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ViewType.Checkboxes
member.summary: A question with multiple choices and where you can select multiple answers

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ViewType.DropDown
member.summary: A question with a Drop Down

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.Id
member.summary: Id (unique across questions)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.Title
member.summary: Short string to refer to the question (e.g. "Player Count")

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.Description
member.summary: Longer string to describe the question, which will be displayed in the tooltip

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.GlobalWeight
member.summary: Optional weight to increase/decrease importance of this question, applied to all answers.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.ViewType
member.summary: The type of view to use to display the question

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.Choices
member.summary: The possible answers to the question

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Question.IsMandatory
member.summary: If the question is mandatory or not. Not overwritten by presets

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Answer.Id
member.summary: Id (unique across answers)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Answer.Title
member.summary: What is displayed to the user

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Answer.Description
member.summary: Optional description that will be shown in a tooltip

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.Answer.ScoreImpacts
member.summary: How picking this answer will impact the score of a given solution

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ScoreImpact.Solution
member.summary: Which score is impacted

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ScoreImpact.Score
member.summary: Absolute value to add or subtract from the target score

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.ScoreImpact.Comment
member.summary: A comment displayed to the user as for why this score is impacted

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.OnboardingSectionAnalyticsProvider
member.summary: The concrete implementation of the IOnboardingSectionAnalyticsProvider interface. It shall be created by the GettingStarted tab with the knowledge of the target package and the section id provided by the attribute of the onboarding section, so that the section implementer does not have to worry about it.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.AnalyticsUtils.GetPackagesWithAnalyticsFormat(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.RecommendationViewData,Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Recommendations.SolutionsToRecommendedPackageViewData)
member.summary: From the recommendation view data (which contains the packages that the user sees and the user's selection), create the list of packages that will be sent to the analytics backend.
member.param: The recommendation view data as shown in the recommendation tab
member.returns: The list of packages to be sent along with the installation event.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.AnalyticsUtils.GetPresetFullNames
member.summary: Fetches all the inspector name attributes of the Preset enum and returns the displayNames Important! It assumes the enum values are 0, ... , N
member.returns: The array of preset names. The index in the array is the integer value of the enum value

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.AnalyticsUtils.ToGameSpecs(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Converts AnswerData to game specs, providing the knowledge of the display names. It assumes there is exactly one answer in the answer list at this point.
member.param: The answer data of the user
Mapping answer id to display name
Mapping question id to display name
member.returns: The list of game spec that will be consumed by the analytics backend

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.AnalyticsUtils.GetQuestionDisplayNames(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData)
member.summary: Creates the mapping from question id to question display name
member.returns: The mapping

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.AnalyticsUtils.GetAnswerDisplayNames(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Questionnaire.QuestionnaireData)
member.summary: Creates the mapping from answer id to answer display name
member.returns: The mapping

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.DebugAnalytics
member.summary: Does the same as the MultiplayerCenterAnalytics, but logs the events to the console instead of sending them. It is useful to debug fast, without the EditorAnalytics Debugger package (but it does not replace it).

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.IMultiplayerCenterAnalytics
member.summary: The interface for the Multiplayer Center Analytics provider (only one functional implementation, but the interface is needed for testing purposes)

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.MultiplayerCenterAnalytics
member.summary: The concrete implementation of the multiplayer center analytics provider. It convert

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.Package
member.summary: Package representation in the analytics data.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.Package.PackageId
member.summary: The identifier of the package.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.Package.SelectedForInstall
member.summary: Whether the user has selected this package for installation.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.Package.IsRecommended
member.summary: Whether the package was recommended.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.Package.IsAlreadyInstalled
member.summary: Whether the package was already installed when the installation attempt event occured

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec
member.summary: A single Answer to the GameSpecs questionnaire.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec.QuestionId
member.summary: The identifier of the answered question (does not change).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec.QuestionText
member.summary: The text of the question as displayed in the UI (may change with versions).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec.AcceptsMultipleAnswers
member.summary: Whether the question accepts multiple answers.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec.AnswerId
member.summary: The identifier of the answered question (does not change).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.GameSpec.AnswerText
member.summary: The text of the answer as displayed in the UI (may change with versions).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.RecommendationData.Preset
member.summary: The preset selected by the user.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.RecommendationData.PresetName
member.summary: The preset selected by the user (game genre) as displayed in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.RecommendationData.QuestionnaireVersion
member.summary: The version defined in the Questionnaire data.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.RecommendationData.GameSpecs
member.summary: All the selected answers to the questions of the game specs questionnaire.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InteractionData
member.summary: What type of content the user Interacted with (buttons).

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InteractionData.SectionId
member.summary: The identifier of the section that contains the button.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InteractionData.Type
member.summary: Whether it is a call to action or a link.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InteractionData.DisplayName
member.summary: The name of the button in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InteractionData.TargetPackageId
member.summary: The target package for which the section is helpful.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData
member.summary: Payload of the installation event.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.Preset
member.summary: The preset selected by the user.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.PresetName
member.summary: The preset selected by the user (game genre) as displayed in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.QuestionnaireVersion
member.summary: The version defined in the Questionnaire data.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.GamesSpecs
member.summary: All the selected answers to the questions of the game specs questionnaire.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.Packages
member.summary: The packages that were in the recommendation tab of the multiplayer center

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.hostingModelName
member.summary: The hosting model selected by the user as displayed in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.hostingModelRecommended
member.summary: The hosting model is the recommended solution.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.netcodeSolutionName
member.summary: The netcode solution selected by the user as displayed in the UI.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Analytics.InstallData.netcodeSolutionRecommended
member.summary: The netcode solution is the recommended solution.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.OpenPackageManager(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the package manager window with selected package name and hides error

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsDirectDependency(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the package is a direct dependency of the project
member.returns: True if the package is a direct dependency

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsInstalled(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a package is installed.
member.returns: True if the package is installed, false otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsLinkedLocallyOrEmbeddedOrViaGit(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a package is embedded, linked locally, installed via Git or local Tarball.
member.returns: True if the package is linked locally, false otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.GetInstalledPackage(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the installed package with the given packageId or returns null.
member.returns: The package info

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.RemoveLocallyLinkedOrEmbeddedOrViaGitPackagesFromList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Filters out the packages that are already embedded, linked locally, installed via Git or local Tarball and returns this new list.
member.param: A list of package IDs that are candidates for installation.
member.returns: A new filtered list of packages.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsAnyPackageInstalled(System.String[])
member.summary: Returns true if any of the given packageIds is installed.
member.param: List of package is e.g com.unity.netcode
member.returns: True if any package is installed, false otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.InstallPackage(System.String,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Installs a single package and invokes the callback when the package is installed/when the install failed.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.RegisterToExistingInstaller(System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Register to an existing installation callback. This has no effect if no installation is ongoing (check to see if that is the case).

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.InstallPackages(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Action{System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Installs several packages and invokes the callback when all packages are installed/when the installation failed.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.InstalledPackageDictionary
member.summary: Create a dictionary with package names as keys and versions as values
member.returns: The mapping (package id, installed version)

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsAnyMultiplayerPackageInstalled
member.summary: Detects if any multiplayer package is installed by checking for services and Netcode installed packages.
member.returns: True if any package was detected, False otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.PackageManagement.IsInstallationFinished
member.summary: Checks if the installation process has finished.
member.returns: True if there is no current installer instance or installation is finished on the installer

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.QuickstartIsMissingView
member.summary: A lot of the getting started content is in the package com.unity.multiplayer.center.quickstart This class is responsible for handling the package and its installation

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.AvailableSectionTypes
member.summary: Stores the available section types in a serializable way, but for comparison purposes only. Only the assembly qualified names are serialized in a sorted array.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.SectionsFinder.k_TargetPackages
member.summary: The target packages that are used to determine if "nothing is installed", which results in sections with the display condition "NoPackageInstalled" to be displayed.
